name: Calendly API
description: Calendly API — REST API for programmatically managing scheduling links, event types, and booking data from Calendly.

seo.title: Calendly API — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Calendly API: Calendly API — REST API for programmatically managing scheduling links, event types, and booking data from Calendly.

when_to_use: Embed Calendly booking into SaaS onboarding flow
CRM sync: auto-create contact on Calendly booking
Programmatic scheduling link generation per sales rep
Webhook trigger for booking confirmation automation
Reporting on meeting volume across sales team

pros: OAuth and webhooks in good shape
cons: Write operations limited on lower plans
No two-way calendar control beyond Calendly
review.verdict: Essential if your users are on Calendly, restrictive if you expected a general-purpose scheduling API.
review.best_for: Products integrating with users' existing Calendly accounts for meeting data
review.not_for: Apps that need a full scheduling engine—use Cronofy or Cal.com instead

lock_in.reason: Proprietary Calendly data exportable via API

transparency.reason: Public pricing tiers plus enterprise custom

developer_experience.reason: REST API with webhooks and OAuth documented
